description_long: This is a beige grocery bag with a subtle dotted texture covering its exterior, giving it a slightly tactile appearance. The bag has a wide, open top and a gently tapering body that narrows toward the base, providing a stable structure for carrying items. Two sturdy, looped handles made of a smooth, light-colored material are attached symmetrically to the top edges, allowing for easy hand carrying. The interior appears spacious and unobstructed, suitable for holding groceries or other personal items. The bag's surface finish is matte, and there are no visible logos, branding, or decorative elements. The overall design is minimalist and functional, ideal for everyday urban use.
description: A beige, textured grocery bag with looped handles and a wide, open top. The design is minimalist, functional, and unbranded.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the bag, its dotted texture, and both loop handles clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow profile of the bag and the vertical alignment of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same texture and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the handles from the side.
